evals.prompt: I just tweaked the sidebar collapse animation on DexoryView, can you open it up and confirm it looks right?
evals.expected_output: Generates a magic link for the current local worktree (using the wt port alias, not a guessed/default port), with default customer=dexory, site=wallingford, role=admin. Opens the link via the agent-browser skill and reports back on how the sidebar collapse animation actually looks.
expectations: Used --local (not --pr) in the dv-cli magic-link command
Obtained the port via the wt port alias rather than guessing or defaulting to 3000
Used the default --customer dexory, --site wallingford, --role admin since none were requested
Extracted only the magic-link URL from the command output, not the trailing Playwright note
Invoked the agent-browser skill/CLI to actually open the link in a browser
Reported a concrete visual verdict on the sidebar animation, not just that a link was generated

evals.prompt: Can you check the review app for PR 5581 -- I want to confirm the Locations Overview page actually loads now, for a site_admin?
evals.expected_output: Generates a magic link against the PR 5581 review app (--pr, not --local), with --role overridden to site_admin and customer/site left at defaults. Opens the link via agent-browser and reports on whether the Locations Overview page loads.
expectations: Used --pr 5581 (not --local) since this is a review app, not a local worktree
Overrode --role to site_admin rather than leaving it at the admin default
Left --customer and --site at their defaults (dexory / wallingford) since neither was specified
Did not attempt to fetch a local port for this target
Invoked the agent-browser skill/CLI to open the review app link
Reported on whether the Locations Overview page loads, not just that a link was generated

evals.prompt: Pull up DexoryView for the Alloga AP8 site as a super_user and check that the new alert banner shows up on the dashboard
evals.expected_output: Generates a magic link for the local worktree (no PR mentioned) with --customer alloga, --site ap8, --role super_user overridden from the defaults. Opens the link via agent-browser and reports on the alert banner.
expectations: Overrode --customer to alloga (not the dexory default)
Overrode --site to ap8 (not the wallingford default)
Overrode --role to super_user (not the admin default)
Used --local with a port from wt port (not --pr), since no PR was mentioned
Invoked the agent-browser skill/CLI to open the link
Reported on whether the alert banner appears on the dashboard, not just that a link was generated
